name: @saas/secret-guard
description: Secret-shape masking for saas-builder and generated templates. Enforces 'enumerate every output route, then pin it with a wiring test' via registerSink(): a coverage test fails if a whole route kind (log/http_response/error_message/url_query/artifact_file) has nothing wired. See README.md and ci/gitleaks.toml for the repo-level (git history) half of this defense-in-depth pair.
